calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Continued To May-08-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ellison Folk, Esq. of Shute Mihaly & Weinberger, Tel. 415.552.7272, for plaintiff and moving party;
Seth Eaton, Esq. of Gibbs Giden Locher Turner & Senet, Tel. 702.836.9800, for defendant via Court Call.

RULING: The matter was discussed. After hearing, PLAINTIFF AS YOU SOW's Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment is granted. The court finds that the settlement should be approved. The attorneys fees are reasonable. Order and Judgment signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
